creator: m.r.sopacua@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 177577
Patch to fix openssl 1.1. compatibilty

Add support for security/openssl-devel. As per debian bug report, it has been submitted upstream. Slightly modified for 9.10.4 version.

Log:
    Take debian patch and reformat slightly

    Activate autoreconf as we're patching configure.in.

    Obtained from:  https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=828082
